name: Patient $validate operation
description: Exercises the type-level $validate operation for Patient. Posts a synthetic Patient and asserts the server returns an OperationOutcome. Assertions inspect the returned OperationOutcome rather than HTTP status, because servers differ on whether input yields 200 with an OperationOutcome or a 4xx status.

test.name: type-level $validate returns an OperationOutcome
test.description: POST /Patient/$validate with a Patient body must return an OperationOutcome resource

operation.description: Validate a synthetic Patient at the type level

assert.description: Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain at least one issue
